title: Ellobocarpus cornutus
taxonomy: Ellobocarpus cornutus is classified as a species of tree within the family Olacaceae. This family consists of flowering plants commonly known as the olive family. The family Olacaceae is part of the order Santalales, which is a group of flowering plants. The order Santalales is a part of the clade asterids. The clade asterids is one of the two main clades of flowering plants, the other being rosids.
